//: Shared loosened compiler options for type-checking the source-only `src/sst` constructs. Pulling in SST's generated `.sst/platform` also pulls its platform source, which is authored against a much looser config than our strict base — so the strictness knobs are relaxed here to match it. This file carries options only (no `include`); the actual project config is `src/sst/tsconfig.json`, which extends it and is what both the editor and `ts:check:sst` use.
